name: ventureforge-service
description: Server-ready foundation for the VentureForge small-business development engine

scripts.check: prisma validate && prisma generate && tsx prisma/seed.ts --dry-run && tsx scripts/validate-knowledge.ts && tsx --test src/tests/intake-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/concept-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/feasibility-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/market-research-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/customer-competitor-analysis.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/strategy-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/execution-roadmap-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/financial-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/funding-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/state-program-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/risk-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/business-plan-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/website-engine.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/ai-service-layer.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/plugin-architecture.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/guided-builder.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/project-workspace.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/project-repository.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/transaction-safe-generation.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/export-system.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/engine-traceability-integration.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/guardrail-audit.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/auth.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/authorization.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/privacy-guardrails.test.ts && tsx --test src/tests/beta-readiness.test.ts && tsc --noEmit && next build --webpack
